description: This video discusses how to determine the level of diversification needed for your investment portfolio, emphasizing the importance of understanding your assets and the potential complexities of managing a diverse portfolio across various blockchains.
topic_summary: Learn how to assess your portfolio diversification needs, considering risk profiles and investment styles. Explore the benefits of using crypto financial products for further diversification [t=27:71].
aliases: How To Decide How Diversified Your Portfolio Should Be
how to decide how diversified your portfolio should be
